changes: Inner Chaos: The effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Chaotic Cyclone: The effect 'Absorbs 100% of damage dealt as HP' has been added.
Mirage Dive: Potency has been reduced from 1,200 to 1,000.
Hissatsu: Soten: Potency has been increased from 1,200 to 1,600.
Gauss Round: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,200.
Afflatus Solace: Cure potency has been increased from 3,000 to 4,000; Regen potency has been reduced from 600 to 400.
Afflatus Rapture: Cure potency has been increased from 1,500 to 2,000; Regen potency has been reduced from 300 to 200.
Tetragrammaton: Maximum charges has been increased from 1 to 2.
Temperance: Increase to damage dealt and healing potency has been changed from 20% to 25%.
Biolysis: Reduction to target's HP recovered by healing actions has been changed from 15% to 10%.
Excogitation: Maximum charges has been increased from 1 to 2.
Dissipation: Increase to healing potency has been changed from 40% to 50%.

new_content.name: The Bozjan southern front
new_content.description: A new instanced encounter wherein players assist the Bozjan Resistance in reclaiming their homeland from the IVth Imperial Legion. Features include skirmishes, critical engagements, Mettle, Resistance rank, and Lost Actions.

new_content.name: Save the Queen: Blades of Gunnhildr
new_content.description: A side story quest series involving the Resistance weapons.

new_content.name: Skysteel Tools
new_content.description: Quest series to enhance crafter and gatherer tools.

new_content.name: Wards 22 through 24
new_content.description: Addition of three new wards to all residential districts, including subdivisions and apartment buildings.

new_content.name: New Game+ Chapters
new_content.description: New chapters added for A Realm Reborn (Parts 1-6).

new_content.name: Triple Triad Additions
new_content.description: New cards and NPC opponents added.

new_content.name: Field Operations
new_content.description: A new category added to achievements.

housing.name: Oriental Wooden Deck
housing.description: A slatted deck in the Far Eastern fashion, perfect for quiet contemplation or loud consumption of dango.

housing.name: Slanted Wall
housing.description: This freestanding wall adds fashionable and potentially confounding angles to any interior.

housing.name: Slanted Skylight
housing.description: A freestanding sloped wall with an inbuilt window to let the sun─and only the sun, somehow─in.

housing.name: Helldiver SD
housing.description: An amazingly lifelike model constructed using specially engineered cloth and cotton bolls by Ironworks employees with a particular...enthusiasm for the helldiver variety of machina. Designation: snuggly.

housing.name: Dainsleif SD
housing.description: An amazingly lifelike model constructed using specially engineered cloth and cotton bolls by Ironworks employees with a particular...enthusiasm for the Dáinsleif machina. Designation: snuggly.
